Root Cause Analysis

  • Contact Form issue: Contact form can be submitted with valid data: Frontend runtime errors were detected and likely caused interaction instability.
  • Forms issue: Discovered forms validate required fields safely: Primary likely cause is backend/API instability reflected by network failures.
  • Responsive issue: Responsive layout remains stable across breakpoints: Primary likely cause is backend/API instability reflected by network failures.
  • Accessibility issue: Accessibility risk checks run on key templates: Primary likely cause is backend/API instability reflected by network failures.
  • Accessibility risk: missing-alt-text: 1 image(s) appear to be missing alt text.
  • Accessibility risk: missing-form-labels: 15 form control(s) appear unlabeled.
  • Accessibility risk: focus-visibility: Focus outline visibility may be insufficient on interactive elements.
  • Responsive layout issues across multiple viewports: Potential layout breakage detected. One or more CTAs appear hidden. Potential layout breakage detected.
  • Console defect: intlTelInput is not loaded.: intlTelInput is not loaded.

Bug Details

Contact Form issue: Contact form can be submitted with valid data (Medium / P2)

During automated validation of "Contact Form - Contact form can be submitted with valid data", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Expected: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.

Actual: Site console error detected: intlTelInput is not loaded.

Suggested fix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.

Forms issue: Discovered forms validate required fields safely (Medium / P2)

During automated validation of "Forms - Discovered forms validate required fields safely", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Expected: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.

Actual: Site console error detected: intlTelInput is not loaded.

Suggested fix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.

Responsive issue: Responsive layout remains stable across breakpoints (Medium / P2)

During automated validation of "Responsive - Responsive layout remains stable across breakpoints", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Expected: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.

Actual: Responsive issues detected on 6/6 viewports.

Suggested fix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.

Accessibility issue: Accessibility risk checks run on key templates (Medium / P2)

During automated validation of "Accessibility - Accessibility risk checks run on key templates", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Expected: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.

Actual: 5 high-severity accessibility risk finding(s) detected across sampled templates.

Suggested fix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.

Accessibility risk: missing-alt-text (Medium / P2)

1 image(s) appear to be missing alt text.

Expected: Page should meet quality expectations without user-impacting defects.

Actual: 1 image(s) appear to be missing alt text.

Suggested fix: Review template markup, labels, focus states, and media alternatives.

Accessibility risk: missing-form-labels (High / P1)

15 form control(s) appear unlabeled.

Expected: Page should meet quality expectations without user-impacting defects.

Actual: 15 form control(s) appear unlabeled.

Suggested fix: Review template markup, labels, focus states, and media alternatives.

Accessibility risk: focus-visibility (High / P1)

Focus outline visibility may be insufficient on interactive elements.

Expected: Page should meet quality expectations without user-impacting defects.

Actual: Focus outline visibility may be insufficient on interactive elements.

Suggested fix: Review template markup, labels, focus states, and media alternatives.

Responsive layout issues across multiple viewports (Medium / P2)

Responsive audit flagged issues on 6 of 6 viewports.

Expected: Page should meet quality expectations without user-impacting defects.

Actual: Potential layout breakage detected. One or more CTAs appear hidden. Potential layout breakage detected.

Suggested fix: Review mobile/tablet breakpoints, hidden CTAs, and layout overflow rules.

Console defect: intlTelInput is not loaded. (Medium / P2)

Runtime console error observed during Contact Form - Contact form can be submitted with valid data.

Expected: Page should meet quality expectations without user-impacting defects.

Actual: intlTelInput is not loaded.

Suggested fix: Fix missing script dependencies or initialization order for affected widgets.
